# Philbrick

> Philbrick Technologies India Pvt. Ltd. is a manufacturer, exporter and
> supplier of elevator components, based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.
> Founded 1992. Address: Plot No. 69, Road No. 6, G.I.D.C. Kathwada, Odhav,
> Ahmedabad 382430, Gujarat, India. Phone: +91 80478 52949.
> GST 24AAHCP6212D1ZU · CIN U31501GJ2014PTC078837 · IEC 0814002951.

Philbrick manufactures the components that make an elevator work: elevator
control panels (automatic-door, manual-door and hydraulic), integrated control
panels (parallel, serial CAN-bus and machine-room-less), the Automatic Rescue
Device (ARD), Elevator IoT connectivity, the Lift Master door-operator
controller, Synergy automatic door mechanisms (centre-opening and telescopic),
elevator doors and cabins, displays (LED segment, dot-matrix, LCD and TFT),
COP/LOP and touch COP/LOP fixtures, voice announcing systems, elevator kits and
accessories, and STEP products. Everything is engineered and built in-house.
Philbrick supplies customers across India and exports to markets including
China and Taiwan.

- [Home](https://www.philbricktech.com/): interactive 3D elevator experience and company overview

- [ARD — Automatic Rescue Device](https://www.philbricktech.com/products/ard)
- [Elevator IoT](https://www.philbricktech.com/products/elevator-iot)
- [Synergy Auto Door](https://www.philbricktech.com/products/synergy-auto-door)
- [Elevator Display](https://www.philbricktech.com/products/elevator-display)
- [COP / LOP](https://www.philbricktech.com/products/cop-lop)
- [Contact](https://www.philbricktech.com/contact): product, supply and modernisation enquiries

## Facts

- Legal name: Philbrick Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.
- Founded: 1992 (Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India)
- Business: manufacturer, exporter and supplier of elevator components
- Flagship safety product: Automatic Rescue Device (ARD)
- Market: India, plus exports including China and Taiwan
- GST 24AAHCP6212D1ZU · CIN U31501GJ2014PTC078837 · IEC 0814002951
